ops.body: Shipped end-to-end: cc-transcript v13.2.0 (patch branch merged into main to satisfy the reusable workflow's tag-ancestry gate — tag history carries zero inversion code), capt-hook v9.15.0 (planned as 9.14.0; a concurrent session took that version — primitive + {file}/home=True harness + docs), cc-context v0.18.0 (Go fail-fast read + pack 0.6.0 per-occurrence migrations + floors). Verification: pack 745 inline / 553 pytest / 905 on the published wheel; incident replay pinned by inline row and reproduced live (the quoted-tilde ccx code read now returns the file). Honest carve-outs, all backlogged: exec-lane exit-code identity (71b43f4 — read fails loudly there but exits 1 not 3), tilth misclassifying existing spacey paths on the CLI lane (777edc9), grep/rg+json phase-2 migrations (084b4db), cc-transcript multi-heredoc walk (9b18c04), capt-hook v14-blocked on ToolUseBlock subclass (25941c1).
